name: Rich Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups flour and 1/2 cup confectioners' sugar. Cut in margarine until crumbly.
3. Press onto bottom of a lightly greased 13 x 9-inch baking pan. Bake for 15 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, combine eggs, granulated sugar, baking powder, lemon juice, and remaining 3 tablespoons flour. Mix well.
5. Pour over baked crust. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Cool. Cut into bars. Sprinkle with additional confectioners' sugar.
7. Store covered in refrigerator. Makes 24 to 36 bars.
